name: Codex
description: Stores Codex CLI auth.json for Pi's built-in OpenAI Codex provider.

env.description: Optional fallback path to Codex CLI auth.json when the plugin .data auth.json is not present.

settings.label: Codex auth.json path
settings.description: Path to the Codex CLI auth.json file. Relative .data paths are resolved inside this plugin's data folder.
